## PrivaCI v0.1.0-beta.3

Security patch release — upgrades `cryptography` to pick up OpenSSL fixes in the
statically linked wheels ([Dependabot #3](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/security/dependabot/3)).

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:0.1.0-beta.3
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:beta    # rolling beta head

helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 0.1.0-beta.3

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v0.1.0-beta.3"
```

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
